How to Use AI

We'll just do it for you.

Get It Implemented → Our Services
Where most businesses get stuck

The gap between knowing AI helps
and actually using it.

🤔
Know it should help, but not how
You read the articles. You understand the potential. You can't translate that into actual changes to how your team works.
🗺️
Don't know where to start
Too many use cases, too many tools, too many opinions. Without a clear starting point, you don't start.
🏝️
Started, but not systematic
You're using it occasionally, for some things, inconsistently. Helpful, but nowhere near transformative.
🧑‍🤝‍🧑
Team not on board
You're the only one using it. The rest of your team is waiting for training, direction, or a reason to change.
The Basics

What actually matters about
AI for your business.

01 — The Mental Model
AI is a writing and thinking assistant — not a replacement for judgment.

The businesses getting real value from AI aren't automating decisions. They're accelerating production work — first drafts, research summaries, structured thinking. Claude is exceptionally good at taking your knowledge and turning it into output. Your expertise is still what makes the output useful.

02 — Why Configuration Matters
The value is in how you set it up, not just how you use it.

Out of the box, Claude is a powerful general tool. Configured correctly — with your business context, brand voice, and standard operating procedures loaded as system prompts — it becomes something your whole team can run consistently and rely on. The setup is what most businesses skip, and it's why most AI experiments don't stick.

03 — The Real Unlock
Implementation beats experimentation every time.

Experimenting with prompts is interesting. Building repeatable workflows is transformative. The difference is structure — clear inputs, configured Claude Projects, team training, and a process your team can run without thinking about it. That's implementation, and it's what we do.

What we do

From "I know it should help"
to "I can't imagine working without it."

01
Workflow Audit
We map your current work and identify the specific tasks Claude should handle — prioritized by time saved and quality impact.
02
Claude Configuration
Full setup — account, Projects, system prompts, knowledge base — everything done before your team touches it.
03
Workflow Build
Working processes your team can run repeatedly — not templates, actual workflows with inputs, prompts, and outputs defined.
04
Documentation
Simple playbooks for each workflow so anyone on your team can run them without coming back to us.
05
Team Training
Hands-on sessions until everyone is using the workflows confidently — not slides, actual practice on your actual work.
06
ROI Measurement
Before-and-after tracking on the specific workflows we built. Real numbers that show what implementation is worth.
